title: rubus geniculatus
intro: Rubus geniculatus, also known as the bent-stem bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus geniculatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Rubus geniculatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
